channel.title: App Store Updates
channel.description: Updates voor gevolgde App Store apps

item.title: News Explorer 2.2.8
item.description:
News Explorer bijgewerkt naar 2.2.8 (was 2.2.7).

• Restored sharing to Raindrop. • Notifications are now grouped by feed folder. • Improved implementation of “Auto correct invalid feed data” option. • Fixed display of articles without a title and summary in article list.

Bekijk in App Store

]]>

item.title: feeeed: rss reader and more 25
item.description:
feeeed: rss reader and more bijgewerkt naar 25 (was 1.0.0).

Bug fixes!

Bekijk in App Store

]]>
